userProfile.title: My Profile - Pharmacy Academy
userProfile.description: View your profile, courses, and certificates.
userProfile.keywords: profile, user, Pharmacy Academy, pharmacist, courses

userProfile.cancelCourseDescriptionFree: After cancellation, this free course will be removed from your active courses immediately, but you can enroll again later.
userProfile.cancelCourseDescriptionPaid: After cancellation, a refund request will be created for admin review and you will lose access to the course until it is resolved.
userProfile.cancelReasonPlaceholder: Add a short reason to help the team review your request
userProfile.cancelSuccessFree: Course cancelled successfully. You can enroll again at any time.
userProfile.cancelSuccessPaid: Course cancelled successfully and your refund request has been submitted for review.
userProfile.cancelError: Unable to cancel this course right now
userProfile.inactiveCoursesDescription: Courses that are no longer active in My Courses, including items waiting for a refund review.
userProfile.inactiveCoursesEmpty: No cancelled courses or refund requests yet
